'''âng-r-n-t''' ('''kangarnetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cellophane|cellophane]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-n-t
|-

| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cellophane|cellophane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-r-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangarnetoko
|}
